title: SET_TIMEOUT
text: SET_TIMEOUT Set the amount of time an HTTP request can take to complete. UHTTP.SET_TIMEOUT( Timeout ) Parameters Parameter Type Direction Description Timeout numeric IN Maximum time allowed for the request in milliseconds. By default it is set to -1 (no timeout). Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $status Value Meaning 0 Success -12 Internal error occurred -13 Timeout value is not valid Use Can be use before the SEND operation. Description The SET_TIMEOUT operation sets the amount of time a HTTP request can take to complete. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
